# MFT Copilot Instructions

- **Architecture**: Expo/React Native app (`mobile/`) backed by Express + Drizzle + Neon (`backend/`). Clerk secures both sides; mobile talks to backend REST at `/api/*`.
- **Run locally**: from repo root `npm run dev:backend` (nodemon) and `npm run dev:mobile` (expo start --clear). Backend .env needs `DATABASE_URL`, `PORT` (optional), `HEALTH_TOKEN`; Clerk server keys loaded via environment. Mobile needs `EXPO_PUBLIC_CLERK_PUBLISHABLE_KEY`; set `EXPO_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL` if you must override the default Railway URL.
- **API base**: `mobile/constants/api.js` points to the Railway-backed production API at `https://api.my-food-tracker.com/api` unless `EXPO_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL` is set. Avoid localhost unless you explicitly override; `API_BASE_URL` strips the `/api` suffix for legacy calls.
- **Server boot**: `backend/src/server.js` applies `clerkMiddleware` before all routes, attaches Drizzle `db`, and runs table guards `ensureProfilesTableShape` + `ensureRecommendationsHistoryTable` before starting the streak cron (`initStreakCronJob`). Keep new routes behind `requireAuth`.
- **Persistence**: Drizzle schema lives in `backend/src/db/schema.js`; Neon connection configured in `backend/src/config/db.js`. When adding columns, mirror the guard pattern (see `ensureProfilesTableShape`) to keep older DBs compatible.
- **Nutrition logging**: `backend/src/routes/nutrition.js` uses `clientEventId` for idempotent inserts, updates daily summaries with deltas, and applies timezone helpers (`parseTimezoneOffsetMinutes`, `getLocalDateUTC`). Preserve this pattern when touching log/edit/delete flows.
- **AI nutrition resolution**: `backend/src/services/smartNutritionResolver.js` is OpenAI-first with 24h NodeCache, optional USDA fallback via `ENABLE_USDA_VERIFICATION=true`. Batch resolution uses `safeJSONCompletion` with strict JSON validation—reuse these wrappers for new AI calls.
- **Gamification**: Meal logging calls `gamificationRewardService` + `achievementService` to award XP, streaks, and achievements. Treat gamification failures as non-blocking (errors logged but requests still succeed).
- **Uploads & image analysis**: Nutrition router uses `multer` (temp `uploads/`) and OpenAI image analysis; keep payload limits at `50mb` as set in `server.js`.
- **Routing map**: Major routers live in `backend/src/routes/` (`food`, `resolve`, `nutrition`, `mood`, `water`, `logging`, `profile`, `analytics`, `gamificationRoutes`, `recommendations`). Add new feature routes there and mount in `server.js` with auth.
- **Mobile shell**: `mobile/app/_layout.jsx` wraps screens with Theme, SQLite `DatabaseInitializer`, React Query (PersistQueryClient), ClerkProvider, NotificationProvider, ApiInitializer, and SafeScreen inside an ErrorBoundary. Respect this provider order when adding globals.
- **Navigation & gating**: Expo Router with tab layout (`mobile/app/(tabs)/_layout.jsx`). Tabs are blocked until onboarding is complete—`fetchUserProfile` checks `onboardingCompletedAt` or full profile fields; incomplete users are redirected to `/onboarding`.
- **React Query config**: `mobile/providers/QueryProvider.jsx` sets retries (queries:2, mutations:1), staleTime 5m, cacheTime 10m, persisted via AsyncStorage (`utils/queryPersistence`). Use `queryClient` from this provider instead of creating new clients.
- **Notifications**: `mobile/providers/NotificationProvider.jsx` handles toasts/modals, Expo push registration, schedules daily/hydration reminders, and syncs prefs via `/profile/notifications`. Ensure new notification features go through this provider and `services/pushNotifications` helpers.
- **Auth tokens on mobile**: Clerk tokens are stored in SecureStore; use `useAuth().getToken()` and pass `Authorization: Bearer <token>` to backend calls (see `services/profileAPI`, `apiClient`).
- **Error handling**: Mobile mutations call `handleApiError` via React Query mutation `onError`; prefer raising meaningful errors that can be surfaced to toasts. Backend has a global error handler—return structured JSON `{ error, message? }`.
- **Timezones & dates**: Backend stores dates in UTC but aligns daily summaries with client offset via helpers in `utils/timezone.js`. When adding date-sensitive logic, use these helpers to avoid off-by-one-day issues.
- **Analytics/Crash reporting**: Initialized in `mobile/app/_layout.jsx` (`initAnalytics`, `setupGlobalErrorHandler`) and sent to backend endpoints under `/api/analytics`. Keep side effects inside `ApiInitializer`/`DatabaseInitializer` instead of screen components.
- **API discovery**: For food search/barcode/image analysis, see `backend/src/services/foodService.js`; new data sources should plug into that service to keep `/api/food/*` behavior consistent.
- **Database migrations**: Use `npm --prefix backend run drizzle:generate` then `drizzle:migrate`. Keep schema guards in sync with migrations to protect existing deployments.
- **Source of truth**: Mobile uses `constants/designTokens.js` & themed variants for styling; reuse `COLORS` and theme tokens instead of inline values.
